subcodes.first_line: O thou who art enraptured and bewildered in the wilderness of God's love! Time hath elapsed since thy departure, and from separation and deprivation thy heart [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای واله و سرگردان بادیه محبت الله مدتیست که رفتی و از هجران و حرمان قلب
subcodes.subjects: @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @love of God, @praise and encouragement
